title: Smoker Tracks the Straw Hats
description: On pages 13–16, this part focuses on smoker tracks the straw hats, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Smoker Tracks the Straw Hats. After leaving Drum, the crew heads deeper into Alabasta’s conflict while the desert kingdom’s danger comes into view. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh my! Hugging onto the first duck that quacks along my way,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Please forgive this foolish little swan,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: To be rescued by pirates I've never met nor heard of...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: I shall never forget the debt I owe to you!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Now then... I am a little peckish and a hot bowl of soup right about now would be smashing, if you please.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Such a cute little thing you are, and just my type tool

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I could just eat you up!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yes. For you see, I've eaten a devil fruit.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hm? Well, since I do have some time to kill until my crew comes looking for me,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Allow me to treat you daisies to a show.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Didn'tI say I'd treat you to a show?

summary: This part highlights smoker tracks the straw hats and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
